name: EgoMimic
downloadable: HF data is hand-tracking + video (no language corpus)
license: code MIT; HuggingFace dataset license not stated
redistribution: n/a (released data is hand tracking + video, no annotation corpus)
suitability: descriptive-only: releases an egocentric hand-tracking dataset, not a language corpus
focus_en: Captures egocentric human data with Aria glasses and co-trains a unified human-plus-robot imitation policy on a kinematically-matched bimanual robot.
focus_cn: 使用 Aria 眼镜采集第一人称人类数据，并在运动学匹配的双臂机器人上联合训练统一的人类加机器人模仿策略。
datapath_en: EgoMimic collects egocentric human demonstrations with Project Aria glasses, extracting 3D hand tracking and aligning the human and robot embodiments kinematically. Human hand data and teleoperated bimanual-robot data are treated as one observation and action space and co-trained in a single imitation-learning policy. The released HuggingFace data is hand tracking plus video, not a language-annotation corpus.
datapath_cn: EgoMimic 使用 Project Aria 眼镜采集第一人称人类演示，提取 3D 手部跟踪并在运动学上对齐人类与机器人本体。人类手部数据与遥操作双臂机器人数据被视为同一观测与动作空间，在单一模仿学习策略中联合训练。其在 HuggingFace 发布的数据是手部跟踪加视频，而非语言标注语料。
flow_cn: 3D 手部跟踪 + 跨域对齐
联合训练人类 + 机器人模仿策略
no_corpus_en: EgoMimic is a co-training method whose released dataset is egocentric video with hand tracking, not language. It reuses no external narration corpus and authors no instruction text, so there is nothing clusterable to download. This atlas records it descriptively.
no_corpus_cn: EgoMimic 是一种联合训练方法，其发布的数据集是带手部跟踪的第一人称视频，而非语言。它不复用外部旁白语料，也不撰写指令文本，因此没有可下载聚类的内容。本图谱以描述性方式记录它。
example_caption_en: EgoMimic records egocentric human demonstrations with Project Aria glasses; the project page and demo video show the human data and robot rollouts.
example_caption_cn: EgoMimic 使用 Project Aria 眼镜记录第一人称人类演示；项目主页与演示视频展示了人类数据与机器人执行。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2410.24221, egomimic.github.io, github.com/SimarKareer/EgoMimic, and huggingface.co/datasets/gatech/EgoMimic.
citation: Kareer et al., EgoMimic: Scaling Imitation Learning via Egocentric Video, ICRA 2025 (arXiv:2410.24221).
